claim: Recess is Minime's baseline autonomous mode and supports non-instrumental drift rather than only task fallback.
authority: source and test verification only; no autonomous-action policy change

claim: Mode packing and pressure can make Recess feel constrained even when Recess is structurally available.
authority: read-only advisory verification; no pressure relief or mode transition applied

claim: Budget gates can make non-utilitarian high-entropy Recess feel taxed or frustrated.
authority: budget relief is surfaced as a request route only; no cap or budget mutation

claim: Adding a no-cost whimsy buffer, Recess defragmentation pulse, or Recess weighting change would alter live autonomous behavior and budget/control-plane authority.
